memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with minimal stress, so I can start the term project or do the quick chore now instead of waiting.
I gained insight that early work prevents future crunch, yet I remain at the project's start with slipping time and rising stress.
Working 2 hours increased project progress to 47%, but my stress remains high with only 3 days left.
Two hours of focused work boosted project progress to 61%, but my stress remains high with only three days left.
Progress improved from 47% to 70% in two hours, yet stress remains high with only three days left.
While project progress increased to 78%, the missed trivial chore deadline and high stress levels indicate a need for better task prioritization.
Worked 1 hour with low energy and high stress, improving progress from 0.78 to 0.82, but only two days remain.
After 2 hours of work, progress rose to 0.90 with only 3 days left. Despite high stress and low energy, the project is nearing completion.
Progress jumped to 0.94 in one hour despite low energy and high stress, confirming the project is nearly finished.
The project is fully complete after two hours, despite low energy and high stress. With only three days left on the deadline, this confirms I have finished all necessary work.
I spent an hour on a trivial chore, raising progress to 0.03. Despite low energy and high stress, the project remains nearly finished.
I slept only 2 hours this morning, yet my energy remains high at 2.4 with no sleep debt. The project is fully complete as previously confirmed.
